title: mutisia subspinosa
intro: Mutisia subspinosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy or sunflower. It is native to South America, specifically in the Andean region. Mutisia subspinosa has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing.
